_note: Demo candidate account seeds. Mirrors backend/demo_accounts.json (rep seed) and the same impersonation considerations apply: don't seed real candidate names + photos here. The single committed entry below is the 'CivicView Test Candidate' — the parallel of the 'CivicView Test Rep' (RepAccount.official_id='test-civicview-internal') used on prod. The matching candidate-registry entry lives at backend/app/data/_internal/candidates.json so the candidate page renders fully (composer, dashboard, posts, polls, engagement) without using a real candidate's identity.
_history: When real candidate accounts are provisioned, they'll come in via the admin queue (waitlist → manual verification → claim_status='active'), not this seed file.
_env_override: Set DEMO_CANDIDATE_ACCOUNTS_JSON in the environment to a JSON string with the same shape to override this file. Useful for hosted demos where credentials shouldn't be baked into the image.
_url: After login, the candidate page is reachable at /?page=test-civicview-internal-candidate (matching the rep test page slug pattern /?page=test-civicview-internal).
